name: Symfony
presentation: The Symfony Community is a group of developers and enthusiasts who contribute to the Symfony framework and organize events like SymfonyCon.

name: PHP Foundation
presentation: The PHP Foundation is a non-profit organization that supports the development and growth of the PHP language and its community.

name: Web Dev Community
presentation: The Web Dev Community is a group of developers and enthusiasts who share knowledge and organize events related to web development.

name: Tech Innovators Network
presentation: The Tech Innovators Network is a community of technology professionals who collaborate and share insights on the latest trends in technology.

name: Open Source Initiative
presentation: The Open Source Initiative is a non-profit organization that promotes and protects open source software and communities.

name: PHP London
presentation: PHP London is a community group dedicated to promoting PHP development in the United Kingdom through meetups and conferences.

name: GrUSP
presentation: GrUSP is the Italian PHP user group organizing phpDay and other community events across Italy.

name: AFUP
presentation: AFUP (Association Française des Utilisateurs de PHP) is the French PHP user group organizing conferences and meetups throughout France.

name: Drupal Association
presentation: The Drupal Association is a non-profit organization that supports the Drupal open source project and its global community.

name: Laravel Community UK
presentation: Laravel Community UK is a volunteer-run group promoting Laravel adoption and best practices across the United Kingdom.

name: Les-Tilleuls.coop
presentation: Les-Tilleuls.coop is a worker-owned cooperative and the main maintainer of the API Platform framework.

name: mdiabuphp
presentation: mdiabuphp is the organising body behind the php[series] family of conferences across North America.

name: React Europe
presentation: React Europe is an independent community organization producing React-focused events and content across Europe.

name: Vue.js Community
presentation: The Vue.js Community is a global collective of developers contributing to Vue and its surrounding ecosystem.

name: Cloud Native Computing Foundation
presentation: The CNCF is a Linux Foundation project fostering open source cloud native technologies including Kubernetes, Prometheus, and Envoy.

name: Netgen
presentation: Netgen is a Croatian digital agency and open source contributor that organises Web Summer Camp annually.

name: Nordic PHP
presentation: Nordic PHP is a community initiative promoting best practices and knowledge-sharing among PHP developers across Scandinavia and the Baltic states.

name: PHP Scotland
presentation: PHP Scotland is a volunteer-run community group promoting PHP development and education in Scotland.

name: Laracon
presentation: Laracon is the official conference series dedicated to the Laravel framework, organized in partnership with local PHP communities.

name: AI Engineers Alliance
presentation: The AI Engineers Alliance is an international community of software engineers building products and services powered by large language models.

name: AI Research Institute
presentation: The AI Research Institute is a leading organization in the field of artificial intelligence research and development.

name: PHP Asia Community
presentation: PHP Asia Community is a network of PHP user groups across Asia-Pacific working together to promote PHP best practices and foster local communities.

name: DevRelCon
presentation: DevRelCon is a global community of developer relations professionals producing conferences and resources for advocates, evangelists, and community managers.

name: entwickler.de
presentation: entwickler.de is a German technology media and events company specialising in developer-focused conferences and publications.

name: Systematic Paris-Region
presentation: Systematic Paris-Region is a cluster of technology companies and research organisations fostering innovation in software and digital systems.

name: CIRCL
presentation: CIRCL (Computer Incident Response Center Luxembourg) is a government-backed initiative supporting cybersecurity research and incident response in Luxembourg.

name: DDD Europe Foundation
presentation: The DDD Europe Foundation is a non-profit organisation promoting Domain-Driven Design education and community building across Europe.

name: Adobe Commerce
presentation: Adobe Commerce is Adobe's enterprise e-commerce platform built on the Magento open source project.
